scripts.test:chromium: cross-env TEST_SCOPE=all BROWSER_PROJECT=chromium NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' playwright test
scripts.test:firefox: cross-env TEST_SCOPE=all BROWSER_PROJECT=firefox NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' playwright test
scripts.test:webkit: cross-env TEST_SCOPE=all BROWSER_PROJECT=webkit NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' playwright test
scripts.test:browsers: cross-env TEST_SCOPE=all BROWSER_PROJECT=all NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' playwright test
scripts.test:ui: cross-env TEST_SCOPE=ui NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' playwright test tests/ui
scripts.test:ui:headless: cross-env TEST_SCOPE=ui HEADLESS=true NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' playwright test tests/ui
scripts.test:ui:headed: cross-env TEST_SCOPE=ui HEADLESS=false NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' playwright test tests/ui
scripts.test:ui:evidence: cross-env TEST_SCOPE=ui CAPTURE_CHECKPOINT_SCREENSHOTS=true NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' playwright test tests/ui
scripts.test:api: cross-env TEST_SCOPE=api NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' playwright test tests/api
scripts.test:ci: cross-env CI=true TEST_SCOPE=all WORKERS=2 NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' playwright test tests --workers=2 --retries=1
